title: acinos arvensis var. villosus
intro: Acinos arvensis var. villosus, also known as Woolly Thyme or Woolly Mint Thyme, is a fragrant, perennial herb that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is native to Europe and Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects, making it useful for treating digestive issues, coughs, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Acinos arvensis var. villosus include its ability to soothe sore throats, calm digestive issues, and reduce stress and anxiety. Acinos arvensis var. villosus can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in herbal remedies and traditional medicines.
